R

rawID - Variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLReference
The raw article title ID.

"reason": The name for the "reason" text.
RECT - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.ImageMap.Area
Rect area.
REFERENCE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLExtendedImage
Tags a reference extended image.
refreshCategories(PackagesDependencies, Article, boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesCategories
Integrate the categories of an article in the list of categories.
refreshCategories(Article, boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Integrate the categories of an article in the list of categories.
REGULAR - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.FontType
The type for regular fonts (the default).
RELAXED - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.SyntaxType
The relaxed syntax type.
removeArticle(Article) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Remove an article.

removeElementDefinitionFile(ElementDefinitionsFile) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Remove one elements definition File.
removeH1Titles(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
Set if H1 titles must be skipped.
removeImage(ImageDefinition) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Removes an image.
removeInfobox(InfoboxDefinition) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Removes an infobox definition.
removeLastElement() - Method in class org.docgene.model.AbstractParagraph
Remove the last element.
removeLastElement() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLChapter
Remove the last element.
removeNav(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
Set if the article nav content must be removed.
removeResource(ResourceDefinition) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Removes a resource.
renameArticle(Article, XMLDisambArticle, String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Rename an article, making sure it will not use an existing name.
replaceArticle(Article) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Replace an article by anotehr version.
reset() - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Reset the properties key / value pairs.
reset() - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
Reset the Localization and sets an en-us Localization.
resetConfiguration() - Method in class org.docgene.api.DocGeneratorAPI
Reset the configuration.
resolve() - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesDictionary
Setup the dictionary.
resolve() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLDisambArticle
Resolve the Disambiguation article.
resolveAPILinks(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if API links are resolved for APIs which are defined internal to the wiki output.
resolveTitles() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Tag the titles as resolved.
resolveWidth() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTableHeader
Resolve the width of the table columns.
ReviewElement - Interface in org.docgene.model
A review element.
RIGHT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Alignment
The Right alignment.
RowBorderType - Interface in org.docgene.model
Represent the type of table row borders.
